description: Dry-run a transcription request: validate the audio file(s) + known-speaker references and emit the OpenAI request payload without calling the API.
rules: read-only — runs the bundled CLI with --dry-run; never contacts the API and needs no OPENAI_API_KEY
validates audio existence (warns above the 25MB limit) and known-speaker NAME=PATH refs (max 4)
enforces model/format rules: diarized_json requires gpt-4o-transcribe-diarize; prompt unsupported on transcribe-diarize
the resolved request payload is written to record_store as payload.json
usage: Set AUDIO (audio file path). Optional: MODEL, RESPONSE_FORMAT (text|json|diarized_json), LANGUAGE, KNOWN_SPEAKER (NAME=PATH). Output: payload.json.
limitation: Dry-run only: builds and prints the payload, never transcribes. Use the transcribe perk for the live call.
